title: Amazon EBS Snapshots should not be publicly accessible
description: The control checks whether block public access is enabled to block all sharing of Amazon EBS snapshots. The control fails if block public access is not enabled to block all sharing for all Amazon EBS snapshots.
what_is_wrong: The control checks whether block public access is enabled to block all sharing of Amazon EBS snapshots. The control fails if block public access is not enabled to block all sharing for all Amazon EBS snapshots.
what_the_fix_does: Blocks public sharing of EBS snapshots for this account and region.

findings.title: Amazon EBS Snapshots should not be publicly accessible

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_medium__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is medium and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.80, privilege_level=1.00, internet_exposure=1.00, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it.

execution_guidance.label: Block all public snapshot sharing
execution_guidance.blast_radius_summary: Affects account-wide security posture for account 696505809372.

pre_checks.message: Confirm this change is intended for AWS::::Account:696505809372 in account 696505809372 (eu-north-1).
Confirm the repository, deployment path, and approver that own this infrastructure change before generating the PR bundle.
Confirm no workflows depend on public snapshot sharing before enforcement.

execution_guidance.expected_outcome: PR mode produces a reviewable infrastructure change: Public access to EBS snapshots will be blocked at the account level. After merge and apply through your IaC path, Security Hub should reflect the remediated state within 12-24 hours.

post_checks.message: Review the generated bundle or diff, then capture plan and apply evidence after the change is merged through the normal infrastructure workflow.
Verify the completed change only affected the intended account scope for AWS::::Account:696505809372.
Trigger immediate re-evaluation after the change lands and confirm the action closes without reopening.

rollback.summary: Use this rollback path to revert the infrastructure change through the same reviewed delivery workflow.
notes: Prefer reverting through version control and your normal deployment pipeline so rollback stays auditable.

execution_guidance.label: Block new public sharing only
execution_guidance.blast_radius_summary: Affects account-wide security posture for account 696505809372.

pre_checks.message: Confirm this change is intended for AWS::::Account:696505809372 in account 696505809372 (eu-north-1).
Confirm the repository, deployment path, and approver that own this infrastructure change before generating the PR bundle.

Existing public snapshot shares may remain and need separate cleanup.

execution_guidance.expected_outcome: PR mode produces a reviewable infrastructure change: New public sharing for EBS snapshots will be blocked while previously public snapshots remain unchanged. After merge and apply through your IaC path, Security Hub should reflect the remediated state within 12-24 hours.
